description: Lock Industrial Parts Catalogs to printed industrial trade literature, not laboratory standards programs or a 1775 placeholder.

checks.reason: The node uses a sourced early-nineteenth-century trade-catalog anchor instead of the old 1775 placeholder.
Printed trade catalogs require printing as the direct publication medium.
Trade catalogs predate Hall's 1822 interchangeable-parts milestone; interchangeability later expanded replacement-part cataloging but is not an origin prerequisite.
Testing laboratories are outside the direct printed-catalog scope.
